title: T-012 — Maintenance outbox publisher (8 events) + Zod payload contracts (MNT §12.3, D-MNT-12)
prompt:
# T-012 — Maintenance outbox publisher

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §12.3 (8 events), D-MNT-12, D-MNT-14 (sanitation allergen cross-module event)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Define the Zod payload contract for the 8 maintenance outbox events, expose them via `packages/events/src/maintenance.ts`, and wire the apps/worker outbox dispatcher (Wave1 T-111) to route them to the correct module consumers per §12.3.

## Pre-flight
Verify Wave1 T-111 outbox table+worker primitive (`outbox_events` or per-module `maintenance_outbox_events`). Verify `packages/events/src/` pattern from prior modules (read Foundation T-003 events package shape).

## Implementation contract
1. `packages/events/src/maintenance.ts` exports Zod schemas + TS types for these 8 events (D-MNT-12 + D-MNT-14):
   - `mwo.requested`, `mwo.approved`, `mwo.in_progress`, `mwo.completed`, `mwo.cancelled` — payload {org_id, site_id, mwo_id, mwo_number, equipment_id, source, type, priority, occurred_at, actor_user_id, ...state-specific cols}
   - `spare_parts.consumed` — {org_id, site_id, mwo_id, part_id, qty, performed_by, occurred_at}
   - `calibration.recorded` — {org_id, site_id, instrument_id, mwo_id?, result, next_due_date, calibrated_by, occurred_at}
   - `sanitation.completed` — {org_id, site_id, mwo_id, line_id, allergen_change_flag, atp_test_result_rlu, first_signed_by, second_signed_by, occurred_at}
   - Additional outbox events: `calibration.failed` (V-MNT-10 → 09-quality), `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` (D-MNT-14 → 08-production allergen_changeover_gate_v1).
2. Each event has `event_version: 'v1'` and `idempotency_key` (UUID v7) per Foundation R14.
3. Routing table in `apps/worker/src/maintenance/outbox-dispatcher.ts`:
   - `mwo.*` → 12-reporting (cache invalidate) + 15-OEE (MTBF/MTTR recalc) + 09-quality (read consumer)
   - `calibration.failed` → 09-quality (lab_results hold candidate)
   - `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` → 08-production allergen_changeover_gate_v1
   - `spare_parts.consumed` → 10-finance cost accumulation (deferred 10-finance consumer)
4. Dispatcher polls outbox table; for each unpublished row, validates payload against Zod schema; marks row published_at on success; records DLQ row on validation failure (no infinite retry).
5. Vitest: Zod schema parses sample payloads; dispatcher routes mwo.completed to 3 consumer queues; invalid payload → DLQ row; idempotent dispatch (re-running on published row is a no-op).

## Files
- packages/events/src/maintenance.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/index.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/src/maintenance/outbox-dispatcher.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/maintenance/__tests__/outbox-dispatcher.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/__tests__/maintenance.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given `mwoCompletedSchema.parse(payload)` with a valid object, when called, then it returns the typed payload; given a payload missing `mwo_id`, then it throws ZodError with path `mwo_id`.
2. Given an outbox row event_type='mwo.completed', when dispatcher runs, then 3 consumer queue messages are written (12-reporting, 15-OEE, 09-quality), and outbox row.published_at is set.
3. Given an outbox row with invalid payload, when dispatcher runs, then a DLQ row is created and the original row is marked `failed_at`, not retried infinitely.
4. Given dispatcher runs twice on the same outbox row, when checked, then second run is a no-op (row already published_at NOT NULL).
5. Given `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` event, when dispatcher runs, then the routing rule maps it to 08-production allergen_changeover_gate_v1 consumer queue.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest asserting all five ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/events vitest run` and `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run maintenance/outbox`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not silently drop invalid payloads — DLQ row required.
- Do not retry indefinitely on validation failure — fail fast to DLQ.
- Do not deviate from Zod schema versioning (`event_version: 'v1'`) — schema evolution policy.
- Do not couple dispatcher to specific consumer modules' implementations — only route to consumer queues by event_type.
- Do not omit cross-module events `calibration.failed` and `sanitation.allergen_change.completed` — they are CIG (cross-module integration gap) closers per Auditor A.

pipeline_inputs.description: Zod payload contracts for 8 maintenance outbox events + dispatcher routing to cross-module consumers + DLQ on validation failure.
pipeline_inputs.details: Closes Auditor A cross-cutting gap: no maintenance outbox tasks existed. Cross-module routing: mwo.* → 12-reporting + 15-OEE + 09-quality; calibration.failed → 09-quality; sanitation.allergen_change.completed → 08-production. Calibration and LOTO sign-off payloads include e-sign attestation fields — produced via @monopilot/e-sign foundation primitive (T-124) — signEvent/dualSign with replay nonce + paired audit (retention='security').
out_of_scope: Server Action writers (T-010, T-011, T-015, T-016)
acceptance_criteria: Given mwoCompletedSchema.parse(payload) with valid object, when called, then returns typed payload; missing mwo_id throws ZodError

Given outbox row event_type='mwo.completed', when dispatcher runs, then 3 consumer queue messages written (12-reporting, 15-OEE, 09-quality) and row.published_at set (foundation T-112 dispatch pattern)
Given outbox row with invalid payload, when dispatcher runs, then DLQ row created and row.failed_at set (no infinite retry); given dispatcher runs twice on same row, then second run is no-op
Given sanitation.allergen_change.completed event, when dispatcher runs, then routing maps to 08-production allergen_changeover_gate_v1 queue

Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/events vitest run` and `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run maintenance/outbox`
